claims.claim: The main exponential form is Lorentz-covariant
The manuscript uses a full Bose-Einstein distribution, not only a Boltzmann/Juttner approximation
claims.status: Confirmed approximation: Juttner/Boltzmann exponential — Bose-Einstein denominator not present in retrieved text
reasons: Formula classification verified as relativistic Boltzmann (Juttner).

claims.claim: Static limit recovers the expected thermal/Cooper-Frye behavior
Massless/pseudorapidity assumptions are valid for the fitted pT range
reasons: Multiplicity data input exists and pT gate was successfully applied.
Confirmed poor constraints and failure to converge in high-multiplicity bins.

claims.claim: Three-component fit (two moving + one static system) is over-parameterized at high multiplicity
reasons: 3c fits failed to converge in most bins, confirming over-parameterization.

claims.claim: chi2/ndf is missing or insufficiently reported
reasons: Independent chi2/ndf calculated and reported successfully.

claims.claim: Tsallis/Tsallis-Pareto and Blast-Wave baselines are needed
Bíró/Paić/Serkin two-component soft/hard baseline matches our model decomposition
reasons: Literature notes and citation signal files exist.

claims.claim: BGBW freeze-out temperature and flow velocity in ALICE pp multiplicity classes
Boltzmann/Jüttner approximation is valid for pT > 120 MeV at LHC temperatures
reasons: Input data uses the 120 MeV low-pT exclusion gate.

claims.claim: Manuscript's 2c Jüttner fit is numerically stable and reproducible with an independent optimizer
claims.status: Contradicted — Minuit cannot reproduce the manuscript fit
reasons: Confirmed 2c Juttner fails to converge in 9/10 bins.
